name: Hevo Data Pipeline API
what_it_does: No-code ELT data pipeline platform with REST API — enabling data teams to build automated pipelines from 150+ sources (databases, SaaS apps, files) to data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks) with automated schema management, data transformation, and pipeline monitoring, without writing code.
use_cases: Creating data pipelines via Hevo API for automated source-to-warehouse ELT orchestration
Monitoring pipeline health via Hevo API for automated data freshness and error alerting
Managing integration configurations via Hevo API for infrastructure-as-code pipeline management
Triggering pipeline runs via Hevo API for event-driven data ingestion workflows
Fetching pipeline metrics via Hevo API for data platform observability dashboards
not_for: Complex SQL transformations at scale (use dbt for transformation layer)
Real-time streaming (Hevo is primarily batch ELT with near-real-time options)
Teams needing custom connector development (limited custom connector support)
best_when: A data team needs rapid pipeline setup from popular SaaS sources (Salesforce, HubSpot, Stripe, etc.) to a data warehouse, with minimal engineering effort and automated schema handling.
avoid_when: You need real-time streaming, complex custom transformations, or deep connector customization.

auth.notes: API key via Authorization: Bearer header or Basic auth with API key as username. API key from Hevo account settings. REST API at api.hevodata.com/v1/. Webhooks for pipeline event notifications (success, failure, schema drift). Rate limiting applies per API key. Team and project context in API paths.

pricing.notes: Indian company (Bengaluru). Founded 2017 by Manish Jethani and Sourabh Agrawal. $42M+ funding (Sequoia India, Qualgro). 150+ pre-built source connectors. Targets: Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks, Firebolt, Delta Lake. Features: Auto-schema mapping, data transformation (drag-and-drop), CDC support for databases. Transformations: Python + SQL support in Hevo Activate (additional product). Monitoring: pipeline health dashboard, SLA alerts. 24/7 support. Used by: Dunzo, Club Mahindra, and mid-market data teams. EU/US data residency options. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Bearer or Basic auth. Pipeline management API. Webhooks for events. Indian company. 150+ sources. SOC2/GDPR. Free tier (1M events/month). Monthly contracts available. Auto-schema management.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Pipeline reads idempotent by pipeline ID. Pipeline creation: check for existing pipeline before creating (not natively idempotent). Trigger runs: idempotent if pipeline is not already running. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers.
known_agent_gotchas: API key as Basic auth username (empty password): some endpoints use this instead of Bearer
Pipeline creation: not idempotent — check if pipeline exists before creating to avoid duplicates
Data transformation: Hevo's transformation layer is separate from the ingestion pipeline
Schema drift handling: auto-schema management may cause unexpected column additions in destination
Indian company: data residency in US/EU available — specify region during account setup
Event-based pricing: monitor event count carefully; schema changes can inflate event counts

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token API key. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Data pipeline carries sensitive data between sources and destinations — encryption in transit required (TLS). Destination credentials stored in Hevo — significant trust surface. Indian company: data sovereignty concerns for some regulated industries. Source credential security: database passwords and API keys stored in Hevo — use IP whitelisting at source level.
